rounds: Lavendra with the necklace, black bag, and Noskin loafers in front of people who actually know him — that one's yours, no question. Purple Country Road bag to the food shop, self-talk caught mid-air and overruled — genuinely yours too. Pink jockstrap to Balmoral two weeks running, change room choice made both times. But the Apollo ring and necklace stayed home from work, and the poncho's still the safety net at Balmoral — those rounds go to the joy police.
pattern: They're loudest when his actual people might clock the gay — work, the swim group, anyone who knew him before.
focus: This week's Internal Work: Wednesday midweek pulse check-in.
